CONTENT.Club career: Mahou made his professional debut for Nice in a 3–3 Ligue 1 draw against Lyon on 20 May 2017. In January 2020, he was loaned to Red Star until the end of the 2019–20 season.

CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Mahou is of Moroccan descent. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Hicham Mahou (born 2 July 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Swiss Super League club Lugano.
